title: leontodon incanus
intro: Leontodon incanus, also known as hoary hawk's beard, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to treat digestive issues such as constipation and indigestion due to its high content of inulin, a prebiotic fiber. The health benefits of Leontodon incanus include its anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Leontodon incanus can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice in traditional herbal medicine.
